entities.name: SUNFLOWER
entities.description: The primary crop species studied for cytomorphological and molecular diversity.

entities.name: HELIANTHUS ARGOPHYLLUS
entities.description: A wild diploid annual species used in interspecific cross combinations.

entities.name: HELIANTHUS PETIOLARIS
entities.description: A wild diploid annual species used in interspecific cross combinations, showing high structural rearrangements and unique alleles.

entities.name: HELIANTHUS ANNUUS
entities.description: A wild diploid annual species used in interspecific cross combinations.

entities.name: HELIANTHUS DEBILIS
entities.description: A wild diploid annual species used in interspecific cross combinations.

entities.name: BACKCROSSING
entities.description: The breeding method used to develop 250 distinct, stable, and uniform inbred lines.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The presence of tri- and quadrivalents at diakinesis used to confirm wild-species genome presence.

entities.name: STRUCTURAL REARRANGEMENTS OF CHROMOSOMES
entities.description: Changes in chromosome structure observed in backcross-derived lines.

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT MARKERS
entities.description: Molecular markers used to measure phenotypic and genetic distance and identify alleles.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DISTANCE
entities.description: Measurement of morphological diversity among inbred lines.

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: Measurement of molecular diversity among inbred lines.

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Variants of genes identified at SSR loci.

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the informativeness of SSR markers.

entities.name: GENETIC DISSIMILARITY
entities.description: Estimates computed using molecular marker data to compare lines.

entities.name: INTROGESSION
entities.description: The process of introducing novel alleles from wild species into the sunflower gene pool.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The latent genetic variation present in wild species.

entities.name: WILD-SPECIES GENOME
entities.description: The genetic material from wild species incorporated into the inbred lines.
